# NSFileProviderItemFields

**Structure**

Fields that specify which of the item’s properties have changed.

## Declaration

```swift
struct NSFileProviderItemFields
```

## Overview

Most of the fields correspond to properties in the [doc://com.apple.fileprovider/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderItemProtocol] protocol.

## Specifying the Required Fields

- **filename**: The item’s filename.
- **contents**: The item’s content.

## Specifying Content Location

- **parentItemIdentifier**: The identity of the directory that contains the item.

## Tracking Usage

- **contentModificationDate**: The item’s modification date.
- **creationDate**: The item’s creation date.
- **lastUsedDate**: The date the item was last used.

## Working with Metadata

- **extendedAttributes**: The item’s extended attributes.
- **fileSystemFlags**: The flags describing the item’s on-disk representation.
- **tagData**: The tags for the item.
- **favoriteRank**: The item’s favorite rank.
- **typeAndCreator**: The file type and creator codes for the item.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates an option instance from the raw value.

## Items and metadata

- **NSFileProviderItemVersion**: The version of the item’s content and its metadata.
- **NSFileProviderRequest**: An object that provides information about the application requesting data from the File Provider extension.
- **NSFileProviderItemDecorating**: Support for decorating items.
- **NSFileProviderItemDecorationIdentifier**: A decoration identifier defined in the File Provider extension’s information property list.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
